title: Mission to Sydney Lyrics Singam 3

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Mission to Sydney conveys themes of adventure and confidence, reflecting the protagonist's fearless spirit.

How does this song fit into the movie plot?

The song underscores key moments in Singam 3, highlighting the hero's journey and challenges.

Who is the singer and music director?

The song is performed by Lady Kash and composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

Mission to Sydney was released on November 27, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mission to Sydney, the vibrant energy of Lady Kash's rap complements the thrilling narrative of Singam 3. The song encapsulates the protagonist's fearless attitude and determination, making it a motivational anthem for listeners. With its catchy beats and dynamic lyrics, it evokes feelings of excitement and empowerment. This track serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of celebration and high-energy activities.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mission to Sydney from Singam 3 is an electrifying anthem that showcases Lady Kash's dynamic rap skills paired with Harrish Jeyaraj's pulsating beats. This track captures the essence of adventure and determination, making it a perfect fit for high-energy moments. Dive into the world of roaring lions and daring escapades with this unforgettable song!
stanzaMeanings: I will smack up the competition, he will match up, no more traps, just hip hop.
Roaring lion, daring lion, soaring lion, rocking lion.
I want to go higher, going to fire, got to be near, never fear.
The Sydney mission is my own decision, I have the vision for the nation.
Crossing the sea, I have come, I will confirm my success at the right time.
I am the roaring lion, now I am the daring lion, no more soaring, I am the rocking lion.
Reloading, big bad boss, boom, bullet zooming into Sydney, a new direction.
I have it all locked down, no questions, dig deeper if you know who can do it solo, whatever it takes.
I will leave a mark in New South Wales, kangaroo kick, this man will flee.
